title: hernandia hammelii
intro: Hernandia hammelii, also known as the "sea mango" or "sea mango tree," is a species of flowering plant in the family Hernandiaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hernandia hammelii include relief from fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its potential use in treating infections and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
